## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New resource / data source
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing resource / data source
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go vet` and `golangci-lint run` pass
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] New/changed endpoints exist in `reference/swagger.v3.json`
- [ ] Documentation added/updated under `docs/`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
